gpy16_pair.rule: Built-in toolkit — g16 auto-discerns .py/.gpy; GrokVM in-tree; legacy GrokPy fallback last

single_fabric.declaration: Single fabric is the 2.0 technology — one belt amplitude, one field depth, linear sovereign time

notes: Grok16 2.0.0 — single fabric belt, safety gates, auto-integrate, triad bench vs host gcc and belt 1.0
changelog: 2.0.0: Single fabric doctrine — knowing fixed-size; parallel I/O fans in, truth one amplitude
2.0.0: Safety meld — depth fields sealed and destroyed; time is linear (ironclad:time:1)
2.0.0: Belt 2.0 profile — chunked redata (8192), wave-massive, OpenMP belt lanes, LTO+Hostess
2.0.0: bench-triad — host gcc vs belt_1_0 vs belt_2_0 compile + runtime
2.0.0: grok16-integrate.sh — auto-wire Queen, World_Redata, ZOCR, PythonG
2.0.0: test-battery-belt — 2.0 validation gate atop release tier
2.0.0: g16 @ 16.2.0 — compat with 1.0 profiles (belt_1_0 aliases field_opt)
1.0.0: Stable release — test-battery-release gate, linker -shared/-pie fix, profile/LTO/PGO hardening
